title: Holt Chat

login.title: Log in
signup.title: Sign up
signup.heading: Save your credentials
signup.warn: There is no password reset and no recovery. If you lose the key file below, this account is gone for good. Save it somewhere safe before you continue.
signup.keyfilehint: This file holds your private key. It never leaves your device, so back it up.
signup.save: Save these to be able to log in
signup.agree: By creating an account, you agree to:
error.ratelimit: Too many attempts, wait a moment and try again
user.delete.body: This permanently deletes your account and all your messages, and removes you from every channel. Nothing is left behind. This can't be undone.
user.anonymize.body: This strips your username, display name and profile picture, and signs you out everywhere. Your past messages stay in channels so conversations aren't left broken, but you can never sign back into this account.
channel.listempty: You don't have any channels, add some with the +
channel.new.name: Name of the channel
channel.banned: You are banned from joining this channel.
channel.edit.name: Name:
channel.callincoming.body: You are reciving a call from {}, pick up?
channel.callincoming.in.body: {} is calling you in {}, pick up?
message.delete.empty.body: Setting a message to empty will delete it.
embed.title: Build an embed
embed.field.title: Title
embed.group.author: Author
embed.field.name: Name
embed.empty: Fill in at least one field before inserting
diagram.title: Build a diagram
diagram.empty: Write some diagram syntax before inserting
interactive.title: Build interactive content
interactive.modalwarning: Runs sandboxed with no network access, but anyone in the channel can view and run it. Don't put private data in it.
interactive.warning: Interactive content — not part of Holt Chat and not verified by it
interactive.empty: Fill in at least one field before inserting
message.pin.unavailable: This message was pinned before you joined and can't be decrypted
message.unverified: Could not verify the author of this message
message.publicChange.body: This means they are a different person.
400.title: 400 Invalid request
404.title: 404 Page not found
405.title: 405 Method not allowed
413.title: 413 Content too big
415.title: 415 Unsupported media type
500.title: 500 Server error
error.blocked: You are blocked by this user
status.title: Status
signup.combined: Include passkey in the file (easier login, less secure)
landing.lead: Encrypted chat that still feels alive. End-to-end by default, with the social parts you actually use: presence, typing, DMs, group channels, voice and video.
landing.manifest.title: The encryption manifest
landing.enc1.title: Message contents & files
landing.enc1.desc: Sealed with a per-channel AES key, wrapped to each member's RSA public key. Rotated on join and leave for forward secrecy. The server stores ciphertext it can't read.
landing.enc2.title: Your private key
landing.enc2.desc: Generated in your browser and saved to a .keys file you keep. It never leaves your device, so no one signs in as you without it.
landing.exp.title: Presence & typing
landing.exp.desc: Online, idle, do-not-disturb and when you're typing are shared so chat feels live. Set yourself to invisible and none of it goes out. Status is yours to flip, anytime.
landing.foot: Open source, MIT licensed. Self-host it, or read every line.
landing.signupnote: New here? Pick a username and we'll mint an RSA key pair in your browser and hand you a key file to keep. Lose the file, lose the account, so back it up.
servers.tagline: Pick an instance to connect to. Each one is its own community, running the same encrypted Holt.
servers.empty: No servers yet. Paste a URL above to add one.
servers.help.p1: An instance is a community that runs Holt. Join one below, or host your own and paste its address.
servers.help.p2: You make a separate account on each instance, so your name and chats live there.
servers.help.p3: Your keys are generated in your browser and never leave your device.
tour.welcome.title: Welcome to Holt
tour.welcome.body: A quick tour of the basics. It takes about a minute, and you can skip anytime.
tour.channels.title: Your channels
tour.channels.body: DMs and group channels you're in show up here. Select one to open the conversation.
tour.add.title: Start a chat
tour.add.body: Create a group channel or start a direct message with someone.
tour.search.title: Find anything
tour.search.body: Search your channels and people by name to jump straight to them.
tour.composer.title: Write a message
tour.composer.body: Type here and press Enter to send. Markdown like **bold** and *italic* works, plus files, emoji and timestamps.
tour.profile.title: You and your status
tour.profile.body: Open your profile to set your status or go invisible. Online, idle and typing are shared only when you want.
tour.settings.title: Settings
tour.settings.body: Tweak notifications, sounds, devices and more. You can replay this tour from the help button anytime.
devicelink.title: Link a device
devicelink.code: Enter this code on the new device
devicelink.instruct: Scan this with the new device, or enter the code there
devicelink.request: A new device wants to log in
devicelink.enter: Enter or scan the code from your logged-in device
devicelink.rejected: The other device rejected the request
verify.title: Verify keys in person
verify.yours: Have them scan this to verify you
verify.theirs: Scan or paste their code to verify them
verify.nocamera: Camera scanning unavailable, paste their code instead
verify.invalid: That isn't a valid Holt key code
verify.wronguser: That code is for {}, not the person you're verifying
bot.create.title: Create a bot
bot.create.note: Bots are full members. Add one to a channel later by its username through the add member flow.
bot.reveal.heading: Bot credentials
bot.reveal.warn: The token and private key are shown once and cannot be recovered. The operator running the bot needs both: the token to authenticate and the private key to read channel messages. Save the file now.
bot.reveal.keyfilehint: This file holds the token and the bot's private key. Hand it to whoever runs the bot.
bot.nochannel: Open a group channel you manage first
bot.addalready: That bot is already in this channel
bot.addperms.label: Permissions
bot.nomanage: You have no channels you can add bots to
bot.regen.body: The current token for {} stops working. You will see the new one once.
bot.delete.body: This removes the bot for good. This can't be undone.
oauthapp.note: Registered apps can use Holt Chat as a login provider. Users approve access before signing in.
oauthapp.create.title: Create an OAuth app
oauthapp.create.name: Name:
oauthapp.create.redirects.hint: The exact URL your app receives the login code on. Must match exactly.
oauthapp.edit.title: Edit OAuth app
oauthapp.reveal.heading: OAuth app credentials
oauthapp.reveal.warn: The client secret is shown once and cannot be recovered. Anyone with it can impersonate your app's login requests. Save the file now.
oauthapp.reveal.keyfilehint: This file holds the client ID and secret for your app's backend.
oauthapp.regen.body: The current client secret for {} stops working. You will see the new one once.
oauthapp.delete.body: This removes the OAuth app for good, and any of its users' sessions stop working. This can't be undone.
oauthapp.error.cap: You've reached your OAuth app limit
oauthconsent.title: Sign in with Holt Chat
oauthconsent.body: {} wants to view your Holt Chat identity (username, display name, avatar). Continue as {}?
oauthconsent.invalid: This sign-in request is invalid or has expired
slash.notchoice: Must be one of the options
